scope.contract: Every runtime action keeps sprite.png + sprite.json and its profile frame_count equals both meta.frameCount and the frames map size.

evidence: source frame script frame24 performs the action transition and stop()
repairs.decision: Remove the generated key named sprite. It was the packer's previous sprite.png output accidentally ingested as a 25th input, not a source animation frame.
repairs.retained: attack1_001 through attack1_024, byte-for-byte cropped from the existing atlas and repacked without alpha multiplication

prevention.packer: scripts/sprite_packer.py excludes an existing sprite.png before packing.
prevention.repair_tool: scripts/repair_zmxiyou1_self_packed_atlas.py rejects any condition other than one explicit self-packed sprite frame and equal-sized retained frames.

checks: 165 actions reference existing sprite-pack PNG and JSON files
profile frame_count equals meta.frameCount and frames-map size
no frames map contains a self-packed sprite key
